testcase.classname: feature to test google search functionality
testcase.name: validate google search is working or not
testcase.system-out: Given browser is open.......................................................passed And user is on google search page...........................................passed When user enters a text in search box.......................................passed And hits enter button.......................................................passed Then user is navigated to search rsults.....................................passed

testcase.name: check login is successful with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: Given user is on login page.................................................passed When user enters username and password......................................passed And user click on login button..............................................passed Then user is navigated to the home page.....................................passed
